'''âw-th-s''' ('''kawathas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:puckerow|puckerow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puckerow|puckerow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-th-s
|-
! Lemma
| kawathas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwathas|thiwathas]] || [[word:jiwathas|jiwathas]] || [[word:shiwathas|shiwathas]] || [[word:kiwathas|kiwathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwathas|thuthuwathas]] || [[word:jujuwathas|jujuwathas]] || [[word:shushuwathas|shushuwathas]] || [[word:kukuwathas|kukuwathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwathas|thuwathas]] || [[word:juwathas|juwathas]] || [[word:shuwathas|shuwathas]] || [[word:kuwathas|kuwathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwathas|thuwathas]] || [[word:juwathas|juwathas]] || [[word:shuwathas|shuwathas]] || [[word:kuwathas|kuwathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewathas|thewathas]] || [[word:jewathas|jewathas]] || [[word:shewathas|shewathas]] || [[word:kewathas|kewathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowathas|thothowathas]] || [[word:jojowathas|jojowathas]] || [[word:shoshowathas|shoshowathas]] || [[word:kokowathas|kokowathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowathas|thowathas]] || [[word:jowathas|jowathas]] || [[word:showathas|showathas]] || [[word:kowathas|kowathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowathas|thowathas]] || [[word:jowathas|jowathas]] || [[word:showathas|showathas]] || [[word:kowathas|kowathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwathas|thĂŠwathas]] || [[word:jĂŠwathas|jĂŠwathas]] || [[word:shĂŠwathas|shĂŠwathas]] || [[word:kĂŠwathas|kĂŠwathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawathas|thathawathas]] || [[word:jajawathas|jajawathas]] || [[word:shashawathas|shashawathas]] || [[word:kakawathas|kakawathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawathas|thawathas]] || [[word:jawathas|jawathas]] || [[word:shawathas|shawathas]] || [[word:kawathas|kawathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawathas|thawathas]] || [[word:jawathas|jawathas]] || [[word:shawathas|shawathas]] || [[word:kawathas|kawathas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawathas|shawathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawathas|goshawathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawathas|gokishawathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawathasnĂŒ|shawathasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawathasnknĂŒ|goshawathasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathasnĂŒ|gokishawathasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawathashĂ«|shawathashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawathasnkshĂ«|goshawathasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawathashĂ«|gokishawathashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathasro|shawathasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathasnkro|goshawathasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathasro|gokishawathasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathasmu|shawathasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathasnkmu|goshawathasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathasmu|gokishawathasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawathasher|shawathasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawathasnksher|goshawathasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawathasher|gokishawathasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawathasng|shawathasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawathasnkng|goshawathasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawathasng|gokishawathasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawathasya|shawathasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawathasnkya|goshawathasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawathasya|gokishawathasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawathasyam|shawathasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawathasnkyam|goshawathasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawathasyam|gokishawathasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathasnĂŒshĂ«|shawathasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawathasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawathasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathasnĂŒro|shawathasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathasnknĂŒro|goshawathasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathasnĂŒro|gokishawathasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathasnĂŒmu|shawathasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathasnknĂŒmu|goshawathasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathasnĂŒmu|gokishawathasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathashĂ«nĂŒ|shawathashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawathasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawathashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathashĂ«ro|shawathashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathasnkshĂ«ro|goshawathasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathashĂ«ro|gokishawathashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathashĂ«mu|shawathashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathasnkshĂ«mu|goshawathasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathashĂ«mu|gokishawathashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathasronĂŒ|shawathasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathasnkronĂŒ|goshawathasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathasronĂŒ|gokishawathasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathasroshĂ«|shawathasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathasnkroshĂ«|goshawathasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathasroshĂ«|gokishawathasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathasromu|shawathasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathasnkromu|goshawathasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathasromu|gokishawathasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathasmunĂŒ|shawathasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathasnkmunĂŒ|goshawathasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathasmunĂŒ|gokishawathasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathasmushĂ«|shawathasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathasnkmushĂ«|goshawathasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathasmushĂ«|gokishawathasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathasmuro|shawathasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathasnkmuro|goshawathasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathasmuro|gokishawathasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
